message:
🐛 Fix widget tooltip: React fragment + hover gap issues (#1122)

- Replace <>...</> fragments with <span> (Übersicht lacks React)
- Reduce tooltip gap from 4px to 1px for failed dot tooltips
- Add invisible ::after bridge element so mouse can reach the
  tooltip without the hover closing

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
